languages.original_text: "Steel your heart, Lady Orsellio. Duty often forces us to stare into the abyss."

languages.text: "Скрепите сердце, Леди Орселлио. Долг часто принуждает нас смотреть в бездну".
"Steel your heart, Lady Orsellio. Duty often forces us to stare into the abyss."
languages.original_text: "Скрепите сердце, Леди Орселлио. Долг часто принуждает нас смотреть в бездну".

"Steel your heart, Lady Orsellio. Duty often forces us to stare into the abyss."

languages.text: 「心を強くしなさい、オルセリオ様。義務はしばしば我々を深淵を見つめさせる」
languages.original_text: "Steel your heart, Lady Orsellio. Duty often forces us to stare into the abyss."

traits.locale_text: 「心を強くしなさい、オルセリオ卿。義務はしばしば我々を深淵を見つめさせる。」

languages.text: « Armez-vous de courage, dame Orsellio. Le devoir nous force souvent à regarder dans l'abîme. »
languages.original_text: "Steel your heart, Lady Orsellio. Duty often forces us to stare into the abyss."

traits.locale_text: « Armez-vous de courage, dame Orsellio. Le devoir nous force souvent à regarder dans l'abîme. »

languages.text: "Stählt Euer Herz, Lady Orsellio. Die Pflicht zwingt uns oft, in den Abgrund zu blicken."
languages.original_text: "Steel your heart, Lady Orsellio. Duty often forces us to stare into the abyss."

traits.locale_text: "Stählt Euer Herz, Lady Orsellio. Die Pflicht zwingt uns oft, in den Abgrund zu blicken."

languages.text: "Kalbinizi sertleştirin Leydi Orsellio. Vazife bizi sık sık uçurumdan aşağıya bakmaya zorlar."
languages.original_text: "Steel your heart, Lady Orsellio. Duty often forces us to stare into the abyss."

traits.locale_text: "Kalbinizi sertleştirin Leydi Orsellio. Vazife bizi sık sık uçurumdan aşağıya bakmaya zorlar."

languages.text: «Ármese de valor, lady Orsellio. A menudo el deber nos obliga a contemplar fijamente el abismo».
languages.original_text: "Steel your heart, Lady Orsellio. Duty often forces us to stare into the abyss."

traits.locale_text: «Ármese de valor, lady Orsellio. A menudo el deber nos obliga a contemplar fijamente el abismo».

languages.text: “淬炼你的心，奥赛罗女士。职责常迫使我们凝视深渊。”
languages.original_text: "Steel your heart, Lady Orsellio. Duty often forces us to stare into the abyss."

traits.locale_text: “淬炼你的心，奥赛罗女士。职责常迫使我们凝视深渊。”
